title: hypericum formosum var. nortoniae
intro: Hypericum formosum var. nortoniae, also known as Nortonia's St. John's Wort, is a plant species in the St. John's Wort family, Hypericaceae, and is native to parts of Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Nortonia's St. John's Wort include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to promote wound healing and internally to support mental health and well-being.
